positive: A stylized minimalist illustration featuring a wise, smiling fox sitting amidst stylized wildflowers and flowing celestial lines. The fox should be rendered in clean, geometric shapes with a dramatic, high-contrast silhouette against a soft gradient background of deep midnight blue and pale lavender. Focus on clean outlines, symmetry, and an ethereal, dreamy aesthetic. Style should evoke modern botanical woodcuts mixed with cosmic abstract art. Composition should place the fox centrally and give the design significant negative space for optimal print scaling. High detail, vector illustration quality, suitable for apparel printing.
